requirements.summary: Fix all non-responsive button click handlers on the /pricing page so that plan selection buttons, profile setup actions, and navigation-to-payment buttons all respond correctly to user interaction
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a plan tier button on /pricing triggers the expected action (profile setup flow or navigation to payment page) without errors.
All interactive buttons on /pricing are visually clickable and respond on click.
No console errors are thrown when interacting with any button on the /pricing page.
Navigation to the payment flow from /pricing works correctly after clicking a paid plan button.

file_operations.description: Implement missing button click handlers: add handleSelectPlan to store selected plan in state and trigger profile setup modal for new users or navigate directly to payment for existing users; implement handleSetupProfile to call saveCallerUserProfile mutation with form data and then navigate to payment; implement handleProceedToPayment using TanStack Router's useNavigate hook to navigate to /payment with selected plan and cycle as URL parameters; ensure all button onClick handlers are properly bound to these functions; add proper error handling and loading states for all async operations; ensure the profile setup modal conditional logic (showProfileSetup) correctly evaluates based on authentication state and profile fetch status to prevent premature rendering.
